no-restricted-syntax.message: Use shadow-level-1..5 per Design.md elevation ladder. Legacy Tailwind drop-shadows are banned.
Use semantic tokens (text-success/error-deep/warning-deep/link-deep, bg-canvas-soft[-2], border-hairline[-strong]) — Design.md bans Tailwind color scales in app code.
Hex colors are banned outside globals.css and tailwind.config.ts. Use design tokens or hsl(var(--token)).
